name: Story Cover Slide
description: Opening cover slide for an Instagram/Facebook Story series. Sets the tone and topic for the story sequence that follows.
guidelines: Full-bleed background image with centered text. The headline should be large and impactful. Include a subtle animated tap/swipe indicator. Keep text minimal — this is a cover slide. Use dynamic imagery related to the story topic. Logo centered at the top for maximum brand visibility. Story-safe zone margins must be respected.
